summary: Iteration 11: Tested Stripe webhook with idempotency, Privacy/Terms/Contact pages, and AI demo mode. Backend: 16/16 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All new legal pages working with proper content and routing. Contact form shows success message. Regression: Dashboard, projects, templates, settings all working.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/subscriptions/webhook handles checkout.session.completed - returns received:true
Backend: POST /api/subscriptions/webhook idempotency - duplicate event returns duplicate:true
Backend: POST /api/subscriptions/webhook handles invoice.payment_succeeded
Backend: POST /api/subscriptions/webhook handles invoice.payment_failed
Backend: POST /api/subscriptions/webhook handles customer.subscription.deleted
Backend: POST /api/subscriptions/webhook handles customer.subscription.updated
Backend: AI demo mode (no XAI key) generates realistic multi-file output
Backend: GET /api/ai/models returns 3 models
Backend: Login endpoint works with test credentials
Backend: GET /api/projects returns list
Backend: GET /api/plans returns plan details
Backend: GET /api/prompt-templates returns 8+ templates
Backend: Share feature (POST /api/projects/:id/share) works
Backend: Export feature works
Backend: Snapshots feature works
Backend: Activity feature works
Frontend: /privacy page loads with full Privacy Policy content (9 sections)
Frontend: /terms page loads with full Terms of Service content (11 sections)
Frontend: /contact page loads with contact form (name, email, subject, message)
Frontend: Contact form shows 'Message Sent!' success after submission
Frontend: Landing page footer has Privacy, Terms, Contact links (not # anchors)
Frontend: Login flow works - redirects to dashboard
Frontend: Dashboard shows projects and Credit Meter (96/10)
Frontend: Project page has Share, Export, Versions, Activity buttons
Frontend: Templates page shows 27 templates with categories
Frontend: Settings page has Account, Billing, API Keys, Security tabs
critical_code_review_comments: Stripe webhook correctly implements idempotency via webhook_events collection
Webhook handles 6 event types: checkout.session.completed, invoice.payment_succeeded, invoice.payment_failed, customer.subscription.updated, customer.subscription.deleted
Legal pages (Privacy, Terms, Contact) have comprehensive real content - not placeholders
Contact form submission is MOCKED (simulates 1.5s delay, no real email sent)
AI demo mode generates realistic multi-file output when XAI_API_KEY is empty
Footer links correctly use React Router Link component (not # anchors)
seed_data_creation: Used existing test project 'Test AI Project' (id: 1ab4a0fb-8069-4dfb-9ea4-d06b6301851f, share_id: GbTYLEW8Kdaocrcx)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 11 adds: 1) Full Stripe webhook at POST /api/subscriptions/webhook with idempotency via webhook_events collection. Events handled: checkout.session.completed, invoice.payment_succeeded, invoice.payment_failed, customer.subscription.updated, customer.subscription.deleted. 2) Legal pages at /privacy, /terms, /contact with full content. Contact form is MOCKED (no email sent). 3) AI demo mode generates realistic placeholder code when XAI_API_KEY is empty. Test user ai_test@example.com has 96 credits remaining.
mocked_apis_note: Contact form submission is MOCKED - simulates sending without real email. AI demo mode generates placeholder code when XAI_API_KEY is not configured.
